articles.title: doublet SS27 Captures the Rush and Chaos of “A DAY IN THE LIFE”
articles.summary: Summary doublet SS27 “A DAY IN THE LIFE” satirizes daily routines through chaotic, hyper‑realistic runway personas.Oversized tailoring, receipt‑print coats, distressed denim, and exaggerated sneakers highlight humor and social commentary.Accessories and PUMA‑referencing graphics inject playful subcultural relevance. For Spring/Summer 2027, doublet stepped into the shoes of multiple personas, with each styled look offering a glimpse into someone’s “A DAY IN THE LIFE.” Presented in Paris, the show unfolded as a playful yet poignant exploration of everyday rituals and overlooked details. Designer Masayuki Ino transformed the runway into a satirical, hyper‑realistic commentary on modern routines, overstimulation, and the absurdities of urban existence. articles.title: India’s Apparel Exports to EU Reach Record US$4.66 Bn in FY26
articles.summary: India’s apparel exports to the EU reached a record of US $ 4.66 billion in FY 2025–26, rising from US $ 4.55 billion in FY 2024–25. According to the Ministry of Shipping the growth has been supported by India’s manufacturing capabilities, along with its focus on quality, innovation, and a resilient supply chain. articles.summary: SummaryOff-White launched L/AB c/o, a new sub-label continuing Virgil Abloh’s accessible "Off-White For All" concept for young consumers.The debut collection features classic industrial-style apparel and sneakers, with all pieces priced under $200.Off-White has a new sub-label, which some fans may find familiar. As a re-up to Virgil Abloh’s accessible “Off-White For All” concept, the late designer’s imprint is reintroducing a diffusion line under a new name with the same message — L/AB c/o.The collection features apparel and sneakers rendered in the brand’s classic industrial aesthetics, including the diagonal strip motif, typographic prints, and plenty of “Off-White” callouts. articles.summary: Name: ASICS GT-2160 BREEZE PackMSRP: ¥15,400 JPY (approx. $95 USD)Release Date: July 2Where to Buy: ASICSASICS has unveiled the GT‑2160 BREEZE Pack, spotlighting a trio of lifestyle‑driven sneakers that reinterpret the retro runner silhouette with modern finishes. Designed for warmer conditions and water-friendly wear, the silhouette arrives in three distinct, versatile colorways: the sleek "Black/Pink Cloud," the crisp and neutral "Glacier Grey/Cream" and the rugged, earth-toned "Brown Storm/Black Coffee."The upper construction retains the sleek aesthetic of the original GT-2000 series but updates it with a soft, slip-on-friendly neoprene tongue and sockliner. Embracing modern gorpcore trends, traditional shoelaces have been swapped out for a utilitarian pull-closure bungee toggle system.

articles.title: Salomon Captures Mount Fuji's Summit With the X ULTRA 360 "GORAIKO"
articles.summary: Name: Salomon X ULTRA 360 GORE-TEX GORAIKOColorway: TBCSKU: L45489000MSRP: ¥20,900 JPY (approx. $129 USD)Release Date: July 1Where to Buy: SalomonThe Salomon X ULTRA 360 GORE-TEX GORAIKO stands as a highly conceptual, performance-driven tribute to Japan’s legendary summit, drawing direct design inspiration from "Goraiko" — the awe-inspiring viewing of the sunrise from the peak of Mount Fuji.The upper features a charcoal grey sole unit and an off-white upper, evoking the shifting brightness against the dark volcanic rock ground. Technical mesh panels are reinforced with synthetic overlays, while the waterproof GORE‑TEX membrane ensures durability and weather protection. articles.title: This Nike Air Force 1 Low Pack Splits Patent Leather and Suede in "Triple Black" and "University Red"

Rather than running a single material across the full upper, Nike divides the build between glossy patent leather on the toe box and quarter panels and a softer suede or nubuck across the overlays.
